block_01: It’s time to show off your trading skills!
block_03: Here’s your free trial account. It’s your chance to give our program a test run entirely risk-free. If you pass the test challenge, you can proceed to take on a similar assessment and get your funded account! Find all your assessment details below.
block_05: We also give you access to our custom dashboard so you can monitor your progress, check your account status, and know if there has been a rule breach.
block_07: If you have any questions at all, please send us an email at [support@sabiotrade.com].
block_08: Disclaimer: Trading carries a high level of risk, and may not be suitable for everyone. Past performance is not indicative of future results. You must be aware that you may sustain a loss of some or all of your initial deposit and therefore, you should not trade with funds that you cannot afford to lose. The information contained in this email does not constitute financial advice in any form, nor is it a solicitation to buy or sell any Forex contract or securities of any type.
